goals.title: PRD to Goal Tree Planning
goals.description: Plan from PRD into a Goal Tree and FWUs, then schedule execution
goals.success_criteria: openexec plan command parses intent and outputs valid JSON task structure
goals.verification_method: Run openexec plan with sample intent and validate JSON output

goals.title: Auditable Execution with Live Status
goals.description: Execute FWUs with an auditable loop and live status via SSE
goals.success_criteria: Execution produces SSE events and writes immutable audit records
goals.verification_method: Subscribe to /events endpoint and verify audit.db entries

goals.title: Stack-Aware Quality Gates
goals.description: Enforce quality via stack-aware gates (Python/JS/Go/Rust) with structured results
goals.success_criteria: Quality gates run automatically and produce structured pass/fail results
goals.verification_method: Run gates on sample code and verify JSON output structure

goals.title: HITL Approval Webhooks
goals.description: Support approvals via Telegram/WhatsApp webhooks and apply decisions to execution
goals.success_criteria: Webhook endpoints accept approve/reject/pause commands and affect execution state
goals.verification_method: Send webhook payloads and verify execution state changes

goals.title: Unified CLI and Web Dashboard
goals.description: Provide a unified CLI (init/plan/start/status/tui) and a web dashboard for observability
goals.success_criteria: All CLI commands functional and dashboard displays live execution data
goals.verification_method: Execute each CLI command and verify dashboard SSE connectivity

goals.title: ISO-Compliant Audit Trail
goals.description: Keep an immutable audit trail with automated evidence export for ISO compliance
goals.success_criteria: openexec export --evidence produces complete, verifiable audit package
goals.verification_method: Run export and validate package contains all required artifacts

stories.title: Discovery: Analyze Existing OpenExec Codebase
stories.description: As a developer, I want to understand the existing codebase structure so that I can safely extend it without breaking existing functionality
acceptance_criteria: Environment variables and dependencies documented
API surface area mapped with inputs/outputs
Local build verified for all components
stories.verification_script: ls -la openexec-*/go.mod openexec-*/go.sum 2>/dev/null || echo 'Go modules found'; ls -la openexec-orchestration/pyproject.toml 2>/dev/null || echo 'Python project found'

tasks.title: Extract environment variables and dependencies
tasks.description: Document all environment variables, Go modules, and Python dependencies across components
tasks.technical_strategy: Parse go.mod files for Go dependencies, pyproject.toml/requirements.txt for Python. Document in DEPENDENCIES.md. Check for .env.example files.

tasks.title: Map existing API surface area
tasks.description: Document all existing CLI commands, HTTP endpoints, and their inputs/outputs
tasks.technical_strategy: Scan cmd/ directories for cobra commands, main.go for HTTP handlers. Create API_SURFACE.md with endpoint paths, methods, request/response schemas.

tasks.title: Verify local buildability of all components
tasks.description: Ensure all existing components build successfully in local environment
tasks.technical_strategy: Run go build ./... for Go components, pip install -e . for Python. Document any build issues. Create build verification script.

stories.title: Orchestration Plan CLI
stories.description: As a developer, I want to run openexec plan <intent> to generate a JSON task structure so that I can preview and validate the execution plan
acceptance_criteria: openexec plan <intent-file> outputs valid JSON to stdout
Plan supports ordering parameter (parallel/sequential)
Plan supports timeout_mode parameter
Tasks are written to .openexec/tasks.json
stories.verification_script: cd openexec-cli && go build -o bin/openexec . && ./bin/openexec plan --help

tasks.title: Define Plan CLI schema and error codes
tasks.description: Define the JSON output schema for plan command and error code constants
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/schema/plan.go with struct types for PlanOutput, Goal, Story, Task. Use json tags. Define error codes in pkg/errors/codes.go. Import encoding/json.

tasks.title: Implement plan command with mock handler
tasks.description: Create cobra command for plan with mock response and unit tests
tasks.technical_strategy: Use cobra.Command in cmd/plan.go. Accept intent file as arg. Add --ordering and --timeout-mode flags with defaults. Return mock JSON for testing. Test with go test.

tasks.title: Integrate orchestration service for plan generation
tasks.description: Connect plan command to orchestration service for actual plan generation
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/orchestration/client.go with HTTP client. Call orchestration /plan endpoint. Parse response into PlanOutput. Handle errors with defined codes.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-cli && go build -o bin/openexec . && ./bin/openexec plan --help | grep -q 'ordering'

tasks.title: Write tasks to .openexec/tasks.json
tasks.description: Persist generated tasks to project directory
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/project/tasks.go with WriteTasks function. Ensure .openexec directory exists. Use json.MarshalIndent for readable output. Add file permission 0644.

stories.title: Non-Bypassable Audit System
stories.description: As a compliance officer, I want all execution events to be immutably recorded so that I have a complete audit trail for ISO compliance
acceptance_criteria: All execution events written to SQLite audit.db
Audit write failures halt execution immediately
Audit records include timestamp, event type, and payload
Audit writes cannot be bypassed by application code

tasks.title: Define audit schema and event types
tasks.description: Create SQLite schema and Go structs for audit events
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/audit/schema.go with AuditEvent struct (ID, Timestamp, EventType, Payload, RunID). Define EventType constants. Use database/sql for schema creation.

tasks.title: Implement AuditWriter with SQLite backend
tasks.description: Create audit writer that persists events to SQLite with transaction safety
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/audit/writer.go. Use modernc.org/sqlite for pure Go SQLite. Wrap writes in transactions. Return error on any failure - do not swallow errors.

tasks.title: Implement execution halt on audit failure
tasks.description: Ensure audit write failures stop execution immediately
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/loop/audit.go middleware. Check Write return error. If error, call loop.Halt() with audit error. Do not use defer for critical audit writes.

tasks.title: Add audit unit tests with 90%+ coverage
tasks.description: Comprehensive unit tests for audit system including failure scenarios
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/audit/writer_test.go. Test successful writes, transaction rollback, concurrent writes, disk full simulation. Use t.Parallel() for concurrent tests.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-execution && go test -v ./internal/audit/... -coverprofile=coverage.out && go tool cover -func=coverage.out | grep total

stories.title: Execution SSE Events Endpoint
stories.description: As a developer, I want to subscribe to GET /events to receive real-time execution updates so that I can monitor execution progress
acceptance_criteria: GET /events returns SSE stream with Content-Type text/event-stream
Heartbeat events sent every 30 seconds
Iteration and phase events emitted during execution
Connection handles client disconnect gracefully

tasks.title: Define SSE event schema and types
tasks.description: Create event type definitions and JSON schemas for SSE events
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/sse/events.go with HeartbeatEvent, IterationEvent, PhaseEvent structs. Use json tags. Define event name constants matching contract.

tasks.title: Implement SSE handler with heartbeat
tasks.description: Create HTTP handler for /events endpoint with heartbeat mechanism

tasks.title: Integrate execution loop with SSE emitter
tasks.description: Connect execution loop phases to SSE event emission
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/loop/emitter.go. Use channels for event passing. Emit iteration_start at loop begin, phase_change on state transitions. Use select with context.Done().

tasks.title: Handle client disconnect and cleanup
tasks.description: Properly handle SSE client disconnection and resource cleanup
tasks.technical_strategy: Use http.CloseNotifier or request.Context().Done(). Stop heartbeat ticker on disconnect. Remove client from subscribers map. Log disconnect events.

stories.title: Execution Start with Provider Flags
stories.description: As a developer, I want to run openexec start with --harness, --provider, and --model flags so that I can configure execution runtime
acceptance_criteria: openexec start begins execution of tasks from .openexec/tasks.json
--harness flag selects execution harness (docker/local)
--provider flag selects LLM provider (anthropic/openai)
--model flag overrides default model
stories.verification_script: cd openexec-cli && go build -o bin/openexec . && ./bin/openexec start --help | grep -q 'harness'

tasks.title: Define start command flags and config schema
tasks.description: Create configuration struct and flag definitions for start command
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/config/execution.go with ExecutionConfig struct. Include Harness, Provider, Model fields with defaults. Use viper for config binding.

tasks.title: Implement start command with mock execution
tasks.description: Create cobra command for start with flag parsing and mock execution
tasks.technical_strategy: Create cmd/start.go with cobra.Command. Parse flags into ExecutionConfig. Validate harness/provider values. Return mock success for initial testing.

tasks.title: Integrate with execution service
tasks.description: Connect start command to execution service API
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/execution/client.go. POST to /execution/start with config. Subscribe to SSE for progress. Handle 4xx/5xx errors with user-friendly messages.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-cli && go build -o bin/openexec . && ./bin/openexec start --help | grep -q 'provider'

stories.title: Stack-Aware Quality Gates
stories.description: As a developer, I want quality gates that understand my tech stack so that I get relevant linting, testing, and security checks
acceptance_criteria: Gates detect project type (Python/JS/Go/Rust) from files
Each stack runs appropriate linters and test commands
Gate results output as structured JSON
Failed gates include specific error locations and messages

tasks.title: Define gate result schema and stack detection
tasks.description: Create structs for gate results and stack detection logic
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/gates/schema.go with GateResult, CheckResult structs. Create pkg/gates/detect.go to detect stack from file patterns (pyproject.toml, package.json, go.mod, Cargo.toml).

tasks.title: Implement Python quality gate
tasks.description: Create quality gate for Python projects with pytest, black, mypy
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/gates/python.go. Run pytest --tb=short, black --check, mypy. Parse output into CheckResult. Capture stderr for error details.

tasks.title: Implement JavaScript/TypeScript quality gate
tasks.description: Create quality gate for JS/TS projects with npm test, eslint
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/gates/javascript.go. Run npm test, npx eslint. Parse JSON output from eslint --format=json. Handle node_modules existence check.

tasks.title: Implement Go quality gate
tasks.description: Create quality gate for Go projects with go test, golangci-lint
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/gates/golang.go. Run go test ./..., golangci-lint run --out-format=json. Parse golangci-lint JSON for error locations.

tasks.title: Implement Rust quality gate
tasks.description: Create quality gate for Rust projects with cargo test, clippy
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/gates/rust.go. Run cargo test, cargo clippy --message-format=json. Parse cargo JSON messages for error extraction.

tasks.title: Add comprehensive gate unit tests
tasks.description: Unit tests for all gates with mocked command execution
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/gates/gates_test.go. Use exec.Command mocking via interface. Test success, failure, timeout scenarios for each stack. Target 90%+ coverage.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-execution && go test -v ./pkg/gates/... -coverprofile=coverage.out && go tool cover -func=coverage.out | grep total

stories.title: Telegram HITL Webhook
stories.description: As an operator, I want to receive approval requests via Telegram and respond with approve/reject/pause so that I can control execution remotely
acceptance_criteria: POST /webhook/telegram accepts Telegram bot updates
Webhook validates secret token from X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token header
Commands /approve, /reject, /pause map to execution actions
Invalid tokens return 401 Unauthorized

tasks.title: Define Telegram webhook schema and commands
tasks.description: Create structs for Telegram updates and command parsing
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/telegram/schema.go with Update, Message, Command structs matching Telegram Bot API. Define command constants APPROVE, REJECT, PAUSE.

tasks.title: Implement webhook handler with token validation
tasks.description: Create HTTP handler for Telegram webhook with secret validation
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/telegram/handler.go. Extract X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token header. Compare with configured secret using constant-time comparison. Return 401 on mismatch.

tasks.title: Implement command parsing and execution mapping
tasks.description: Parse Telegram commands and map to execution service actions
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/telegram/commands.go. Parse /approve <id>, /reject <id> <reason>, /pause. Call execution service client with appropriate action. Return confirmation message.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for Telegram webhook
tasks.description: Comprehensive tests for webhook authentication and command handling
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/telegram/handler_test.go. Test valid token, invalid token, missing token. Test each command with valid/invalid formats. Mock execution client.

stories.title: WhatsApp HITL Webhook
stories.description: As an operator, I want to receive approval requests via WhatsApp and respond with approve/reject/pause so that I have an alternative communication channel
acceptance_criteria: POST /webhook/whatsapp accepts Twilio webhook requests
Webhook validates Twilio signature from X-Twilio-Signature header
Text responses 'approve', 'reject', 'pause' map to execution actions
Invalid signatures return 403 Forbidden

tasks.title: Define WhatsApp/Twilio webhook schema
tasks.description: Create structs for Twilio webhook payload parsing
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/whatsapp/schema.go with TwilioWebhook struct. Fields: From, Body, MessageSid. Use form tags for url.Values parsing.

tasks.title: Implement Twilio signature validation
tasks.description: Create HTTP handler with Twilio signature verification
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/whatsapp/handler.go. Implement Twilio signature validation using HMAC-SHA1. Compare with X-Twilio-Signature header. Return 403 on mismatch.

tasks.title: Implement message parsing and execution mapping
tasks.description: Parse WhatsApp text messages and map to execution actions
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/whatsapp/commands.go. Parse Body field for approve/reject/pause keywords. Extract task ID and reason. Call execution client. Return TwiML response.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for WhatsApp webhook
tasks.description: Comprehensive tests for signature validation and message handling
tasks.technical_strategy: Create pkg/whatsapp/handler_test.go. Test valid signature, invalid signature. Test each command format. Verify TwiML response format. Mock execution client.

stories.title: OpenExec Init Command
stories.description: As a developer, I want to run openexec init to create a .openexec directory and initialize stores so that I can set up a new project for orchestration
acceptance_criteria: openexec init creates .openexec directory in current path
Creates empty tasks.json and config.yaml files
Creates audit.db SQLite database with schema
Warns if .openexec already exists without --force
stories.verification_script: cd openexec-cli && go build -o bin/openexec . && ./bin/openexec init --help

tasks.title: Define init command structure and templates
tasks.description: Create default file templates and directory structure
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/init/templates.go with embedded template files using //go:embed. Define default config.yaml and empty tasks.json structures.

tasks.title: Implement init command with directory creation
tasks.description: Create cobra command that initializes project structure
tasks.technical_strategy: Create cmd/init.go with cobra.Command. Check for existing .openexec. Create directory with 0755 permissions. Write template files. Initialize audit.db with schema.

tasks.title: Add --force flag and safety checks
tasks.description: Implement force overwrite and existing directory warnings
tasks.technical_strategy: Add --force bool flag. If .openexec exists and !force, print warning and exit 1. If force, backup existing to .openexec.bak before overwriting.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-cli && go build -o bin/openexec . && ./bin/openexec init --help | grep -q 'force'

stories.title: OpenExec Status Command
stories.description: As a developer, I want to run openexec status to see current execution state so that I can monitor progress from the terminal
acceptance_criteria: openexec status connects to execution service SSE
Displays current phase, active task, and completion percentage
Updates in real-time as events are received
Exits cleanly on Ctrl+C
stories.verification_script: cd openexec-cli && go build -o bin/openexec . && ./bin/openexec status --help

contract.output: Current phase, task info, progress bar

tasks.title: Implement SSE client for status updates
tasks.description: Create SSE client that connects to execution /events endpoint
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/sse/client.go. Use bufio.Scanner for SSE parsing. Handle 'event:' and 'data:' lines. Return parsed events via channel. Handle reconnection.

tasks.title: Implement status command with live display
tasks.description: Create cobra command that displays real-time execution status
tasks.technical_strategy: Create cmd/status.go. Connect SSE client. Use terminal ANSI codes for in-place updates. Show phase, current task, progress bar. Handle SIGINT for clean exit.

tasks.title: Add --follow and --json output flags
tasks.description: Add flags for continuous following and JSON output mode
tasks.technical_strategy: Add --follow bool (default true), --json bool flags. If !follow, print current state and exit. If json, output raw SSE events as JSON lines.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-cli && go build -o bin/openexec . && ./bin/openexec status --help | grep -q 'json'

stories.title: Live TUI Dashboard
stories.description: As a developer, I want to run openexec tui for a rich terminal interface so that I can have full visibility into workers, tasks, and logs
acceptance_criteria: openexec tui displays full-screen terminal interface
Shows worker status panel with active/idle counts
Shows task queue with pending/running/completed tasks
Shows live log stream from execution
Supports keyboard navigation between panels
stories.verification_script: cd openexec-cli && go build -o bin/openexec . && ./bin/openexec tui --help

tasks.title: Set up Bubbletea TUI framework
tasks.description: Initialize Bubbletea app with basic model structure
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/tui/app.go. Import github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea. Define Model struct with panels slice. Implement Init, Update, View methods.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-cli && go get github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea && go build -o bin/openexec .

tasks.title: Implement workers panel component
tasks.description: Create panel showing worker status and counts
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/tui/panels/workers.go. Show active/idle/total counts. List worker IDs with current task. Use lipgloss for styling. Update from SSE events.

tasks.title: Implement tasks panel component
tasks.description: Create panel showing task queue with status
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/tui/panels/tasks.go. Show pending/running/completed/failed counts. List tasks with status indicators. Support scrolling with j/k keys.

tasks.title: Implement logs panel component
tasks.description: Create panel showing live execution logs
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/tui/panels/logs.go. Ring buffer for last 100 log lines. Auto-scroll to bottom. Color-code by log level. Support pause with space key.

tasks.title: Implement keyboard navigation and layout
tasks.description: Add keyboard shortcuts and responsive panel layout
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/tui/layout.go. Tab key cycles focus between panels. q quits. Resize handler adjusts panel widths. Use lipgloss.JoinHorizontal for layout.

tasks.title: Integrate TUI with SSE event stream
tasks.description: Connect TUI components to execution SSE feed
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/tui/stream.go. Use goroutine to read SSE. Send events to Bubbletea via Program.Send(). Update model state from events.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-cli && go build -o bin/openexec . && ./bin/openexec tui --help

stories.title: ISO-Compliant Evidence Export
stories.description: As a compliance officer, I want to run openexec export --evidence to generate a complete audit package so that I can satisfy ISO audit requirements
acceptance_criteria: openexec export --evidence creates timestamped export directory
Export includes full audit.db copy
Export includes all verification evidence files
Export includes model versions and gate reports
Optional cryptographic signing of export manifest
stories.verification_script: cd openexec-cli && go build -o bin/openexec . && ./bin/openexec export --help | grep -q 'evidence'

tasks.title: Define export manifest schema
tasks.description: Create schema for export manifest with metadata
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/export/manifest.go. Define Manifest struct with ExportTime, RunID, ModelVersions, GateResults fields. Use json tags for serialization.

tasks.title: Implement evidence collection
tasks.description: Collect all verification evidence from execution
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/export/collector.go. Copy audit.db with WAL checkpoint. Collect evidence files from .openexec/evidence/. Collect gate reports from .openexec/gates/.

tasks.title: Implement export command with packaging
tasks.description: Create cobra command that packages evidence into export directory
tasks.technical_strategy: Create cmd/export.go. Create timestamped directory YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_export/. Copy collected files. Write manifest.json. Support --output path override.

tasks.title: Implement optional cryptographic signing
tasks.description: Add --sign flag for manifest signing
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/export/sign.go. Use ed25519 for signing. Sign manifest.json content. Write signature to manifest.json.sig. Read signing key from OPENEXEC_SIGNING_KEY env.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-cli && go build -o bin/openexec . && ./bin/openexec export --help | grep -q 'sign'

stories.title: Story-Level Validation Review
stories.description: As a reviewer, I want story-level validation checkpoints so that I can verify integrated features rather than individual tasks
acceptance_criteria: Tasks within stories have autonomous verification (evidence-based)
Story completion triggers validation review checkpoint
Validation review checks integrated feature against acceptance criteria
Review results recorded in audit trail

tasks.title: Define review tier schema and states
tasks.description: Create schema for two-tier review process
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/review/schema.go. Define ReviewTier enum (Task, Story). Define ReviewState (Pending, InProgress, Passed, Failed). Define ReviewResult with evidence links.

tasks.title: Implement task-level verification
tasks.description: Create automated verification for individual tasks
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/review/verification.go. Run task verification_script. Capture output as evidence. Record result in audit.db. Return ReviewResult.

tasks.title: Implement story-level validation checkpoint
tasks.description: Create validation checkpoint triggered on story completion
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/review/validation.go. Trigger when all tasks verified. Check integrated feature against acceptance_criteria. Support manual validation input. Record in audit.

tasks.title: Add review audit integration
tasks.description: Record all review activities in immutable audit trail
tasks.technical_strategy: Create internal/review/audit.go. Emit REVIEW_STARTED, REVIEW_PASSED, REVIEW_FAILED events. Include reviewer ID, timestamp, evidence links. Use existing AuditWriter.

stories.title: Web Dashboard with SSE
stories.description: As an operator, I want a web dashboard showing projects, phases, workers, and audit events so that I can monitor execution from a browser
acceptance_criteria: Next.js dashboard accessible at configured URL
Dashboard shows list of projects with status
Real-time updates via SSE connection
Displays current phases and worker states
Shows recent audit events
stories.verification_script: cd openexec-web && npm install && npm run build

tasks.title: Set up Next.js project structure
tasks.description: Initialize Next.js project with TypeScript and configuration
tasks.technical_strategy: Use create-next-app with TypeScript template. Configure .env.local with OPENEXEC_API_URL. Set up src/app directory structure. Install tailwindcss for styling.

tasks.title: Implement SSE client hook
tasks.description: Create React hook for SSE connection management
tasks.technical_strategy: Create src/hooks/useSSE.ts. Use EventSource API. Handle reconnection with exponential backoff. Parse SSE events into typed objects. Return events and connection state.

tasks.title: Implement projects list page
tasks.description: Create main page showing all projects with status
tasks.technical_strategy: Create src/app/page.tsx. Fetch projects from API. Display cards with project name, status, last activity. Use SSE hook for real-time status updates.

tasks.title: Implement project detail page
tasks.description: Create page showing phases, workers, and tasks for a project
tasks.technical_strategy: Create src/app/projects/[id]/page.tsx. Show phase timeline. Display workers table with status. Show task queue. Subscribe to project-specific SSE events.

tasks.title: Implement audit events page
tasks.description: Create page showing recent audit events with filtering
tasks.technical_strategy: Create src/app/audit/page.tsx. Fetch audit events from API. Support filtering by event type, time range. Display as scrollable table. Real-time updates via SSE.

tasks.title: Add component unit tests
tasks.description: Unit tests for dashboard components
tasks.technical_strategy: Create tests in __tests__/ directories. Use @testing-library/react. Mock SSE connection. Test loading, error, and data states. Target 80%+ coverage.

stories.title: Docker Development Environment
stories.description: As a developer, I want a Docker-based development environment so that I can run all OpenExec services locally with hot-reload
acceptance_criteria: docker compose up starts all services
Source code changes trigger automatic rebuild
All containers pass health checks
Ports exposed for local development access
stories.verification_script: docker compose config && docker compose build

tasks.title: Create Dockerfiles for Go services
tasks.description: Create multi-stage Dockerfiles for CLI, Execution, Interface services
tasks.technical_strategy: Use golang:1.21-alpine as builder. Separate go mod download from build for cache. Use scratch or distroless for final image. Add HEALTHCHECK instruction.
tasks.verification_script: docker build -t openexec-cli openexec-cli/ && docker build -t openexec-execution openexec-execution/

tasks.title: Create Dockerfile for Python orchestration service
tasks.description: Create Dockerfile for orchestration service with development mode
tasks.technical_strategy: Use python:3.11-slim. Install with pip --no-cache-dir. Create non-root user. Add HEALTHCHECK with curl. Support hot-reload with watchfiles.

tasks.title: Create Dockerfile for Next.js web dashboard
tasks.description: Create Dockerfile for web dashboard with development mode
tasks.technical_strategy: Use node:20-alpine. Multi-stage: deps, builder, runner. Use standalone output mode. Add HEALTHCHECK. Support hot-reload in dev mode.

tasks.title: Create docker-compose.yml for all services
tasks.description: Configure docker-compose with volume mounts and networking
tasks.technical_strategy: Define all services with build contexts. Map host directories for hot-reload. Create internal network. Define health checks. Expose development ports.

tasks.title: Verify all containers start and pass health checks
tasks.description: Ensure complete Docker environment starts successfully
tasks.technical_strategy: Run docker compose up -d. Wait for health checks with timeout. Check all services reach 'healthy' state. Document any startup dependencies.
tasks.verification_script: docker compose up -d && sleep 30 && docker compose ps | grep -v 'unhealthy'

stories.title: Goal Validation E2E Tests
stories.description: As a project stakeholder, I want automated E2E tests that validate all primary goals so that I can verify the system works end-to-end
acceptance_criteria: E2E test suite covers all 6 primary goals
Tests run against Docker environment
Playwright tests for web dashboard
CLI integration tests for command workflows
Test results generate coverage report

tasks.title: Set up Playwright E2E test project
tasks.description: Initialize Playwright project with configuration
tasks.technical_strategy: Create openexec-e2e directory. Run npm init playwright. Configure baseURL from env. Set up Docker compose dependency. Create test fixtures for common setup.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-e2e && npm install && npx playwright install

tasks.title: Implement G-001 Planning E2E test
tasks.description: E2E test for PRD to Goal Tree planning flow
tasks.technical_strategy: Create tests/planning.spec.ts. Test openexec plan with sample intent. Verify JSON output structure. Check tasks.json written. Assert goal tree completeness.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-e2e && npx playwright test planning.spec.ts

tasks.title: Implement G-002 Execution E2E test
tasks.description: E2E test for auditable execution with SSE
tasks.technical_strategy: Create tests/execution.spec.ts. Start execution, subscribe to SSE. Verify iteration events received. Check audit.db entries created. Assert completion event.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-e2e && npx playwright test execution.spec.ts

tasks.title: Implement G-003 Quality Gates E2E test
tasks.description: E2E test for stack-aware quality gates
tasks.technical_strategy: Create tests/gates.spec.ts. Test gates on sample Python, JS, Go projects. Verify structured JSON output. Check pass/fail detection. Assert error location accuracy.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-e2e && npx playwright test gates.spec.ts

tasks.title: Implement G-004 HITL E2E test
tasks.description: E2E test for Telegram and WhatsApp webhooks
tasks.technical_strategy: Create tests/hitl.spec.ts. Send mock Telegram webhook with approve command. Verify execution state change. Test WhatsApp webhook similarly. Check audit trail.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-e2e && npx playwright test hitl.spec.ts

tasks.title: Implement G-005 CLI and Dashboard E2E test
tasks.description: E2E test for CLI commands and web dashboard
tasks.technical_strategy: Create tests/cli.spec.ts. Test init, plan, start, status commands. Navigate dashboard pages. Verify SSE updates in UI. Check all panels render correctly.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-e2e && npx playwright test cli.spec.ts

tasks.title: Implement G-006 Audit Export E2E test
tasks.description: E2E test for ISO-compliant evidence export
tasks.technical_strategy: Create tests/audit.spec.ts. Run execution to completion. Execute export --evidence. Verify export directory structure. Check manifest completeness. Test optional signing.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-e2e && npx playwright test audit.spec.ts

tasks.title: Generate E2E test coverage report
tasks.description: Configure coverage reporting for E2E suite
tasks.technical_strategy: Configure playwright.config.ts with reporter: [['html'], ['json']]. Create coverage aggregation script. Output to coverage/ directory. Include in CI artifacts.
tasks.verification_script: cd openexec-e2e && npx playwright test --reporter=html && test -d playwright-report
